# ARCH ASSIST — Higgsfield Asset Manifest & Prompts

Drop each generated file at the exact path below and it appears automatically.
Until then, elegant animated blueprint placeholders are shown — nothing breaks.

Recommended model: **nano_banana_pro** (2K) for stills, **kling / seedance** for video.
Palette to mention in prompts: warm off-white #F6F3EE, ink #1E1E1E, accent gold #C9A66B.

## Hero (landscape, 16:9)
- `public/assets/hero-workspace.jpg`
  > Premium architecture studio workspace, slightly angled overhead view: detailed white massing model, rolled & unrolled blueprints, sketchbooks, technical drawings, metal scale rulers, tracing paper, material samples, technical pens, stacked architecture books, laptop showing 3D modeling software. Warm daylight, cream #F6F3EE tones, soft shadows, gold accents, cinematic editorial photography, ultra-detailed, shallow depth of field.

## Hero floating model (portrait, 3:4)
- `public/assets/hero-model.jpg`
  > Single detailed white architectural massing model on a clean cream surface, dramatic soft daylight, subtle gold rim light, museum object, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed.

## Services — 3D showcase objects on DARK background (portrait, 3:4)
Each: "Premium floating 3D showcase object on dark cinematic background, glass & matte architectural materials, soft warm gold glow, volumetric lighting, exhibition pedestal, ultra-detailed product render."
- `public/assets/services/01-site-analysis.jpg` — layered topographic site model, contour terraces, climate/wind overlays, circulation arrows, context massing blocks.
- `public/assets/services/02-concept.jpg` — morphing massing studies, concept evolution diagram, sketch-to-form transition.
- `public/assets/services/03-2d-drawings.jpg` — plans, sections, elevations & drafting sheets transforming into a spatial object.
- `public/assets/services/04-working-drawings.jpg` — exploded construction details, wall sections, technical assemblies.
- `public/assets/services/05-3d-modeling.jpg` — Revit/SketchUp/Rhino-style geometry studies, digital architectural forms.
- `public/assets/services/06-bim.jpg` — smart data-rich BIM model, intelligent building systems, info overlays.
- `public/assets/services/07-renders.jpg` — luxury interior/exterior render, dramatic lighting & material study.
- `public/assets/services/08-sheets.jpg` — floating jury presentation boards, visual storytelling layout.
- `public/assets/services/09-walkthrough.jpg` — cinematic architectural flythrough frame, camera journey through space.
- `public/assets/services/10-thesis.jpg` — research wall, concept boards, design development models, final jury prep.
